text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary flagging an urgent GitHub personal access token expiration notice.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary flagging a Tavily payment failure that requires immediate attention.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary flagging a Zamzar billing issue as the most pressing matter.
- [escalation] GitHub: Urgent notification that GitHub personal access token 'jeeves3' expires in about 5 hours.
- [escalation] GitHub: Urgent notification that GitHub personal access token 'jeevesagain' expires in about 5 hours.
- [reply needed] David Purdy: David Purdy apologizes for pushing and explains a client is asking about map deliverables.
- [reply needed] Michael Lang: Michael Lang informs David Purdy he will focus on the project this week while family is away.
- [reply needed] David Purdy: David Purdy asks Michael for an update on RegionFlex districts work and offers help.
- [decision required] Zamzar: Zamzar billing service requesting updated payment details due to failed payment processing.
- [decision required] Laravel: Invitation to join a team on Laravel platform that requires acceptance or rejection.
